name: Chicken with Avocado Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 Green onions with tops, thinly sliced
4 Heated corn tortillas or lettuce leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange chicken around the edges of a 9-inch pie plate or baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with chili powder, salt and pepper.
3. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
4. Rotate the dish midway through cooking and microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes; set aside.
5. Peel, seed and chop the avocado. Combine with lime juice in a small bowl.
6. Add salsa, tomato and green onions; toss gently.
7. Slice cooked chicken lengthwise into 1 to 2-inch strips and arrange on tortillas, making 4 servings.
8. Top each serving with salsa.
9. Microwave at 50% (medium) for 2 minutes or until heated.
Makes 4 servings.
